{"rationale":"Well-structured bead with clear title, type, labels, parent, deps, description, and acceptance criteria. Strengths: AC items are specific and testable, dataset size is concrete (10 beads, 15 links), query patterns are named (US-023, US-025), and the test count floor (AC5 ≥10) is explicit. Weaknesses: (1) No explicit 'status' field — unclear if this is ready/blocked/draft, which matters for lifecycle gating. (2) AC6 bundles two distinct checks (cargo test pass + clippy clean) into one criterion, making partial failure ambiguous. (3) Description says 'should land after … child beads provide the required runtime features' but the dep list only names the parent axon-ad2a9669, not the specific child beads (QueryStore, executor core, advanced-clause) — those should be listed in 'deps' if they are hard prerequisites. (4) 'downstream:ddx' label is correct given the DDx dataset theme, but 'helix' label adds no discriminating value here. (5) The title prefix 'build(feat-009):' is unconventional — conventional commit scope typically uses a module name, not a feature tag, inside the parens.","score":82,"suggested_fixes":["Add a 'status' field (e.g., 'blocked') and list the specific child-bead IDs in 'deps' that must land first (QueryStore bead, executor core bead, advanced-clause bead).","Split AC6 into AC6 (cargo test -p axon-cypher passes) and AC7 (clippy clean for axon-cypher) so each can be checked independently.","Replace the title prefix 'build(feat-009):' with a conventional commit scope that names the module, e.g., 'feat(axon-cypher): DDx graph-query end-to-end integration'.","Remove the generic 'helix' label if it carries no filter value, or replace with a more specific label such as 'area:integration-test'."],"waivers_applied":[]}

  AC2  ddx_ready_query_* and ddx_blocked_query_* — full parse→validate→plan→execute E2E
  AC3  dependency_dag_direct_deps_of_bead_01_ordered_by_id + dependency_dag_leaf_node_has_no_deps
  AC4  reachability_bead_02_transitive_deps_via_variable_length_path (*1..3 path)
  AC5  14 tests covering: DDx ready/blocked, dep DAG, reachability, DISTINCT, OPTIONAL MATCH,
       EXISTS true/false, count(*), ORDER BY ASC, ORDER BY DESC, incoming link traversal
  AC6  cargo test -p axon-cypher: 14 integration + 64 unit tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean

No code changes required in this execution attempt.
